name: Incode
description: Incode delivers a full-stack identity platform with ID document verification, passive liveness, biometric authentication and AML screening, designed for financial services, crypto and government use cases.

seo.title: Incode — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Incode: Incode delivers a full-stack identity platform with ID document verification, passive liveness, biometric authentication and AML screening, designed for

when_to_use: Full-stack KYC for crypto exchange regulatory onboarding
Passive liveness detection for mobile banking onboarding
Government ID document authentication for regulated sectors
AML screening integrated with identity verification workflow
Biometric re-authentication for high-value transaction approval

pros: Full identity stack including liveness and screening
Proven in banking, crypto and government use
Biometric auth reusable across repeat logins
cons: Enterprise pricing tough for early-stage teams
Heavy vendor lock-in once biometrics stored
Coverage varies by country for document types
Dashboard can feel overwhelming on first use
review.verdict: Strong enterprise IDV platform that pays off at scale; overkill for most pre-series-A startups.
review.best_for: Banks, crypto exchanges and government agencies needing full-stack IDV with biometric reuse
review.not_for: Early-stage startups with low volumes who'd outgrow Onfido or Persona before needing Incode

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
